content:
Incident: API Rate Limit Exceeded

Symptoms:
too many requests
429 error
api blocked
request rejected

Root Cause:
Application exceeded third-party API quota.

Resolution:
Implement request throttling.
Use exponential backoff.
Increase API quota.

Payment Gateway Integration
Notification Service

Incident: Authentication Failure

Symptoms:
login failed
authentication error
invalid token
access denied

Root Cause:
Expired authentication tokens and identity provider outage.

Resolution:
Refresh tokens.
Restart identity provider.
Verify authentication configuration.

Authentication Service
Customer Portal

Incident: SSL Certificate Expired

Symptoms:
ssl handshake failed
certificate expired
secure connection failure

Root Cause:
SSL certificate renewal was missed.

Resolution:
Renew certificate.
Deploy updated certificate.
Enable expiry monitoring.

Internet Banking
Mobile Banking

Incident: High CPU Utilization

Symptoms:
cpu usage above 90 percent
slow response
thread contention
service degradation

Root Cause:
Inefficient queries and excessive thread creation.

Resolution:
Optimize queries.
Tune thread pools.
Scale application instances.

Transaction Service
Analytics Service

Incident: Database Connection Refused

Symptoms:
connection refused
database unreachable
sql exception
failed query execution

Root Cause:
Database server was unavailable due to maintenance activity.

Resolution:
Restart database service.
Verify listener configuration.
Check database health.

Payment Service
Loan Service

Incident: Database Pool Exhaustion

Symptoms:
DB exhaustion
database timeout
connection refused

Root Cause:
HikariCP pool exhausted

Resolution:
Increase pool size
Check connection leaks

Incident: Disk Space Exhaustion

Symptoms:
disk full
unable to write logs
application crash
storage alert

Root Cause:
Excessive log retention consumed available disk space.

Resolution:
Delete old logs.
Enable log rotation.
Increase storage capacity.

Logging Platform
Monitoring Platform

Incident: DNS Resolution Failure

Symptoms:
unknown host
dns lookup failed
service unreachable

Root Cause:
DNS server outage prevented hostname resolution.

Resolution:
Restore DNS service.
Update DNS records.
Verify resolver configuration.
All Microservices

Incident: Fraud Detection Service Down

Symptoms:
fraud check unavailable
transaction verification failed
risk engine timeout

Root Cause:
Fraud detection engine crashed due to insufficient memory.

Resolution:
Restart fraud engine.
Increase memory allocation.
Investigate crash logs.

Fraud Detection
Transaction Monitoring

Incident: Kafka Consumer Lag

Symptoms:
consumer lag increasing
delayed processing
messages not consumed
backlog accumulation

Root Cause:
Consumer instance crashed and stopped processing messages.

Resolution:
Restart consumer service.
Increase consumer instances.
Verify broker connectivity.

Transaction Monitoring
Fraud Detection

Incident: Load Balancer Failure

Symptoms:
service unavailable
503 error
traffic routing failure
application inaccessible

Root Cause:
Load balancer health checks failed for all backend instances.

Resolution:
Restore backend instances.
Verify health check configuration.
Restart load balancer.

Customer Portal
Internet Banking

Incident: Memory Leak

Symptoms:
out of memory
high memory usage
application restart
garbage collection spikes

Root Cause:
Objects were continuously allocated without proper cleanup.

Resolution:
Fix memory leak in application code.
Analyze heap dump.
Optimize object lifecycle.

Customer Service
Loan Service

Incident: Network Timeout

Symptoms:
request timeout
socket timeout
service unreachable
slow communication

Root Cause:
Network congestion and packet loss between services.

Resolution:
Verify network routes.
Check firewall rules.
Monitor latency.

Payment Service
Customer Service

Incident: Payment Gateway Timeout

Symptoms:
payment timeout
transaction pending
payment failed
gateway timeout

Root Cause:
Third-party payment gateway API response time exceeded threshold.

Resolution:
Retry transaction.
Switch to backup payment provider.
Notify payment operations team.
Payment Service

Incident: Redis Connection Failure

Symptoms:
cache unavailable
cache timeout
slow response
session lookup failure

Root Cause:
Redis node became unavailable due to memory pressure and network interruption.

Resolution:
Restart Redis cluster.
Verify memory utilization.
Check network connectivity.

Authentication Service
Customer Portal
